name: sensorFusion
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.method === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.sensors. Field-aligned 2026-06-28 to RoboticsActionPanel.tsx: the fusion card renders sensorCount / fusedValue / fusedConfidence / method EXACTLY plus sensors[].{sensor,value,confidence} (the {sensor}: {value} (c={confidence}) list). fusedValue = confidence×weight-weighted mean of values (3dp); sensor name falls back to type. Fail-CLOSED: non-finite value/confidence/weight fall to finite defaults (0 / 0.8 / 1) via Number.isFinite so fusedValue is always finite. Empty/non-array sensors return the honest 'Add sensor data' message, never throws.
